tools.title: GitHub Label Setup
tools.description: Automatically create a consistent set of 25+ GitHub labels (categories, priorities, difficulty and status) for a repository. Provided in Python, JavaScript, Bash and PowerShell so it runs in any environment.
features: Creates 25+ organized labels in one run
Consistent color scheme following GitHub conventions
Checks for GitHub CLI installation and authentication
Batch creation with progress feedback and a success summary
Identical behaviour across all four language implementations

tools.title: Script Registry Management Tool
tools.description: An automated tool for managing and organizing scripts in the Nerva project. This tool automatically scans your scripts, generates metadata, and updates the website with your contributions.

tools.title: 📧 Email Automation Tool
tools.description: A comprehensive Python script for automating email tasks including bulk sending, personalized messages, and scheduled email campaigns. Perfect for newsletters, notifications, and automated email workflows.

tools.title: Disk Usage Report
tools.description: Quickly find what is eating your disk space. Reports the largest directories under a given path, sorted by size.
features: Lists the largest sub-directories under any path
Shows total usage of the target path

tools.title: 🔍 Advanced Duplicate File Finder
tools.description: A powerful Python script that efficiently finds and manages duplicate files using MD5 hashing. Perfect for cleaning up storage, organizing files, and identifying redundant content across your filesystem.

tools.title: 🗂️ Advanced File Organizer
tools.description: A powerful Python tool that automatically organizes files in directories based on file extensions or creation dates. Features multiple organization modes, dry-run capability, and detailed logging.

tools.title: 🌐 URL Status Checker
tools.description: A comprehensive Python tool for checking the status of URLs in bulk. Perfect for monitoring website availability, validating link lists, and performing health checks on web services.

tools.title: 📶 Auto WiFi Check
tools.description: A Python script that monitors WiFi connectivity and automatically performs network diagnostics when connection issues are detected. Perfect for troubleshooting network problems and maintaining stable internet connections.

tools.title: Password Generator
tools.description: Generate strong, random passwords from the command line. Available in Python, Bash and PowerShell so you can use whichever runtime is already on your machine.
features: Mix of upper/lowercase letters, digits and symbols
Zero third-party dependencies in every language

tools.title: Port Scanner
tools.description: A fast, multi-threaded TCP port scanner for checking which ports are open on a host. Useful for quick network diagnostics and authorized security assessments.
features: Concurrent scanning with a configurable thread pool
Scan single ports, ranges, or comma-separated lists
Optional service-name lookup for open ports
Clean, sorted summary of open ports

tools.title: 🔍 FTP Anonymous Login Scanner
tools.description: A Python script to check for anonymous FTP access on single or multiple hosts. This tool is useful for security assessments and network reconnaissance.

tools.title: 🛡️ SHADOW - Vulnerability Scanner
tools.description: An advanced Python-based vulnerability scanner that uses YAML templates to detect security issues in web applications and network services.

tools.title: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Pretty-print, minify and validate JSON from a file or standard input. Available in Python and Node.js — both are zero-dependency.
features: Minify JSON to a single compact line
Validate JSON with a clear error and non-zero exit code
Reads from a file argument or piped stdin

tools.title: System Information
tools.description: Collect and display key details about a machine — OS, CPU, memory and disks — in one quick command. Available in Python (cross-platform) and PowerShell (Windows).
features: CPU model, cores and logical processors
Per-drive disk capacity and free space
Human-readable table or machine-readable JSON output

tools.title: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate RFC 4122 version-4 UUIDs from the command line with a single zero-dependency Node.js script.
features: Cryptographically secure UUIDs via Node's built-in `crypto` module
Generate one or many UUIDs at once
Optional removal of hyphens for compact IDs
